# Kopern — AI Agent Builder, Orchestrator & Grader

> Build, test, deploy, and connect production-grade AI agents with tool calling, deterministic grading, multi-agent teams, MCP endpoints, and external connectors (widget, webhooks, Slack).

## What Kopern Does

Kopern is a web platform for creating custom AI agents that go beyond simple chatbots. Each agent can have:

- **System Prompt**: Core instructions defining behavior, role, and output format
- **Skills**: Markdown knowledge templates injected as XML into the agent's context
- **Custom Tools**: JSON Schema parameters + sandboxed JavaScript execution — agents call these as functions
- **GitHub Integration**: Connect repos → agents get `read_file`, `search_files`, and `github_write` tools + repo tree context
- **Extensions**: TypeScript lifecycle hooks for safety, logging, cost control (30+ event types, blocking support)
- **Grading Suites**: Automated testing with 6 criterion types (output_match, schema_validation, tool_usage, safety_check, custom_script, llm_judge)
- **Purpose Gate**: Session-scoped question to focus agent behavior
- **TillDone Mode**: Multi-step task enforcement with auto-prompting
- **Branding**: Custom icons and colors per agent
- **Tool Overrides**: Fine-tune LLM behavior per agent (temperature, max tokens, thinking level)

## LLM Support

Multi-provider with native tool calling:
- Anthropic Claude (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5)
- OpenAI GPT (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini)
- Google Gemini (2.5 Flash)
- Mistral AI (Mistral Large, Codestral, Nemo)
- Ollama (local models)

## Orchestration

- **Agent Teams**: Parallel, sequential, or conditional execution of multiple agents with per-member tools
- **Pipelines**: Sequential chains where each step's output feeds the next with input/output mapping
- **Sub-Agent Delegation**: Agents can delegate tasks to other agents

## AutoResearch — Optimization Lab

6 self-improving optimization modes:
- **AutoTune**: Auto-optimize system prompts against grading suites
- **AutoFix**: Diagnose and patch failing test cases
- **Stress Lab**: Adversarial testing with edge-case generation
- **Tournament**: Arena-style comparison of prompt variants
- **Distillation**: Transfer knowledge to smaller/cheaper models
- **Evolution**: Genetic algorithm-based prompt evolution

## External Connectors

- **Embeddable Chat Widget**: `<script>` tag for any website — Shadow DOM isolation, SSE streaming, markdown rendering, mobile-responsive, "Powered by Kopern" badge
- **Webhooks Inbound/Outbound**: REST API integration — inbound receives JSON, outbound fires on events (message_sent, tool_call_completed, session_ended, error). HMAC-SHA256 signing. Compatible with n8n, Zapier, Make.
- **Slack Bot**: OAuth install → Events API → thread support with reaction checkmarks. Agents respond to @mentions and DMs.

## MCP Protocol

Expose any agent as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server:
- Streamable HTTP transport at `/api/mcp/server`
- Compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, and any MCP client
- API key authentication (`kpn_` prefix)
- Tools: `kopern_chat` (send message), `kopern_agent_info` (agent metadata)

## Billing

- **Starter**: Free tier — 3 agents, 100K tokens/month
- **Pro** ($79/mo): 25 agents, 2M tokens, grading, teams, 3 connectors
- **Usage-based**: Unlimited agents and tokens, pay per use
- **Enterprise** ($499/mo): Unlimited everything, priority support

## Architecture

- Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript (strict mode)
- Firebase (Firestore real-time subscriptions, Auth with Google/GitHub/Email)
- SSE streaming for all agent interactions
- Sandboxed tool execution (Node.js vm module)
- Real-time billing with Stripe Billing Meters
- i18n: English and French

## Key Pages

- `/en` — Landing page with meta-agent creator (create an agent from a text prompt)
- `/en/examples` — Gallery of 15+ agent templates
- `/en/pricing` — 4 tiers (Starter free, Pro, Usage, Enterprise)
- `/en/docs` — Full documentation with search

## API Endpoints

- `POST /api/agents/{id}/chat` — SSE streaming chat with tool calling
- `POST /api/agents/{id}/grading/{suiteId}/run` — Run grading suite
- `POST /api/agents/{id}/autoresearch/{mode}` — AutoResearch optimization
- `POST /api/agents/{id}/pipelines/{id}/execute` — Pipeline execution
- `POST /api/teams/{id}/execute` — Agent team execution
- `POST /api/mcp/server` — MCP Streamable HTTP (real protocol)
- `POST /api/widget/chat` — Embeddable widget chat (SSE + CORS)
- `POST /api/webhook/{agentId}` — Inbound webhook (sync JSON)
- `POST /api/slack/events` — Slack Events API handler
- `POST /api/agents/meta-create` — AI-assisted agent creation

## Languages

Available in English and French.

## More

For extended documentation, see: /llms-full.txt
